No Poverty.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is explicitly for graduate students (碩、博士班研究生), providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and developing advanced academic and research skills (Target 4.4) essential for legal scholarship.
evidence: 協助本院碩、博士班研究生撰寫學位論文

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While legal skills are professional, the course does not directly address decent work, economic growth, employment, or related targets.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's explicit focus on 'Administrative Law' (行政法論文寫作) directly contributes to promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) and developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 研討行政法領域之議題

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly requires using 'Japanese administrative law as a comparative reference' (日本行政法為參考比較對象), which promotes international knowledge sharing and cooperation (Target 17.6) and fosters a global vision.
evidence: 須以日本行政法為參考比較對象
科際整合與國際視野的能力
